payload.answer: Duplicates detected; commit the single consolidated memory about Sam (from Goldman) liking Bill Evans.

payload.intent: Evaluate whether to commit durable memory from a duplicate Slack event

details: Input indicates the same Slack event ID delivered twice; deduplicated to one durable memory card.

If 'Sam' could refer to multiple people in your context, ask for clarification or store without affiliation until disambiguated.
